run_summary.summary: 🚨 ONGOING: Gmail OAuth token expired — Brandi still cannot scan email (8+ consecutive failed runs as of 2026-06-20). Re-authorization required to restore pipeline monitoring.
run_summary.error: Gmail OAuth token expired or revoked (invalid_grant). Re-authorization required.

suggestions.message: ACTION NEEDED: Gmail token has been expired for 8+ consecutive runs — Brandi has been unable to monitor your inbox since at least 2026-06-20. Run `node scripts/gmail-reauth.mjs` locally to re-authorize. After completing the browser consent flow for hartmanncollabs@gmail.com, copy the new refresh token into your environment config (Vercel env vars or .env.local). Full instructions print to the terminal when the script runs.
